testcase.name: applyOverrides called multiple times is idempotent when values unchanged
applyOverrides accepts zero as a valid override for kcal
entry cannot be considered complete until all missing fields are overridden
isComplete returns false when all four fields are missing
isComplete returns true when all four fields are present
applyOverrides does not overwrite an existing non-null kcal with a non-null override
missingFields remains non-empty when not all missing fields are filled
applyOverrides preserves existing non-null kcal when override is null
applyOverrides accepts zero for all macros simultaneously
